title: COMPOSE: Static Timing-driven Composable Reconfigurable Architecture for Accelerating Recurrence-Bound Loops
summary: Introduces COMPOSE, a composable CGRA architecture that uses static timing information to fuse operations across loop iterations, reduce register pressure, and improve throughput for recurrence-bound loops.

title: Wearable Electrotactile Feedback for Motor Skill Acquisition
venue: Proceedings of the 57th ACM Technical Symposium on Computer Science Education V. 2
summary: Explores wearable electrotactile feedback as a scalable embodied learning aid for dexterous classroom skills, with a focus on unobtrusive closed-loop systems informed by EMG-based muscle synergy analysis.
